data.body: CHECKPOINT 7: discovered flaky test test_warm_resolution_is_cheap (test_config_perf.py) — 0.5s wall-clock ceiling flaked at ~0.50-0.51s under CI load across py3.11/12/13, blocked #666 twice. Filed bug 19d7 (discovered_from d4de, relates 85c3), claimed, fixed (ceiling 0.5s->5.0s; broken-cache regression still caught). Inserted flakefix as new BOTTOM of the stack (rebase --onto) so all changes' CI trees include it. Full stack now pushed as relation chain: #667(19d7 flakefix)->#665(d0e5)->#666(bcf0)->#668(5e7a)->#669(f542). All re-CIing. NOTE: pre-commit hook runs make lint+typecheck; MUST source .venv before git commit or hook fails 'mypy: No such file'. 5e7a needed 4 review rounds (AC-wording pedantry, docs work was correct). d0e5/bcf0/5e7a/f542 all claimed + review-passed+signed. Next: await all 5 green -> submit stack top(#669) -> close bugs dc33/15a1/0d3e+19d7 + child tickets + epic -> bcf0 live-ops -> 03c6 cutover LAST.
